modeReason: ELEVATED risk (score 30/100). Two new risk signals detected since 08:30Z assessment: (1) Systemic CI regression (#723) — identity gate breaks cli-claude-hook tests on every PR until fixed; (2) New conflicted PR #731 (1076 additions, CONFLICTING, no CI). Security gaps #638/#637 persist without PRs. Prior recommendation to switch to 'normal' reversed — maintain conservative mode until CI regression #723 is resolved.

prBlastRadius.note: 1 open PR (#731): feat(issue-328) team observability analytics — 1076 additions, 23 deletions, 6 files. CONFLICTING (merge conflict). No CI checks run yet. Large feature PR (analytics CLI + SQL aggregation queries). PR #724 (refspec fix) appears merged — no longer in open PRs. Labeled #731 conflict:needs-human.

testFailureRate.note: CRITICAL NEW SIGNAL: Issue #723 (priority:high, 2026-03-22T08:18Z) reveals that the identity gate system (#706-#715, merged today) breaks cli-claude-hook tests in CI on EVERY PR. Root causes: (1) Tests expect process.exit(0) for allowed actions but get exit(2) because no .agentguard-identity fixture exists in CI; (2) Identity driver detection returns 'ci' in CI environment but tests expect 'copilot'/'claude-code'; (3) Rust test count mismatch (same family as #659). These failures will recur on ALL future PRs until fixed. Current raw CI: 1 failure on abandoned branch (paperclip), rest all-green. But systemic regression means all active PRs will fail.

governanceDenialRate.note: Persistent: #638 (HIGH security: policy evaluator fail-open, no PR), #637 (HIGH security: AAB regex bypass, no PR), #646 (HIGH: CI/CD invariant too broad), #648 (HIGH: read-only operations blocked), #650 (HIGH: pattern-matches command body text), #643 (HIGH: missing test coverage), #659 (CRITICAL technical debt: Rust count assertion). No new critical security regressions since 08:30Z. Note: #627 resolved via merged PR #724.

mergeConflictRate.note: 1/1 open PRs is CONFLICTING (100%). PR #731 created at 10:29Z, immediately conflicting. Conflict dimension regressed from 0 (prior) to 1 conflicted PR. Small sample size but 100% conflict rate is signal.
